_comment: Copy to lathe.config.json (gitignored) and edit. An explicit env var ALWAYS overrides a value here (env > config > default). NEVER put a push token in this file — use env or the git credential helper.

_notes.subscription: Point analyst.url at claude_proxy.py (wraps the Claude subscription as an OpenAI endpoint, $0/token) for the thinking; keep implementer local for the bulk. That is the cost leverage.
_notes.higher+higher: For max correctness (no cost constraint), set implementer.model to 'claude' too — both roles then use the strong model.
